index_page_content: Top Up with Cryptocurrencies Like Bitcoin and USDT
content: Recarga con Criptomonedas como Bitcoin y USDT

index_page_content: You can fund your Bitsika Virtual Card using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and USDT on supported networks such as BTC, ERC20 or BEP20. Once Bitcoin or USDT is deposited into your Bitsika balance, you can immediately use it to create or top up your virtual cards. Funding with crypto lets you create and use your card from any country without relying on traditional banking or mobile money. It's fast, flexible, and works globally.

Una vez depositado Bitcoin o USDT en tu saldo Bitsika, puedes usarlo inmediatamente para crear o recargar tus tarjetas virtuales. Financiar con cripto te permite crear y usar tu tarjeta desde cualquier lugar de Venezuela sin depender de la banca tradicional. Es rápido, flexible y funciona globalmente.

index_page_content: You do not need to submit any KYC documents, phone number, or ID verification to create and use a Bitsika Virtual Card. A simple shopping card powered by crypto should not require complicated paperwork, and our users love this convenience. You can go from downloading the app to having a ready-to-use card in just 5 minutes.
content: Las Tarjetas Virtuales Bitsika requieren verificación KYC para cumplimiento, pero el proceso es rápido y simplificado. La mayoría de los usuarios en Venezuela obtienen su aprobación KYC en aproximadamente 1 hora tras enviar documentos válidos como Cédula. Esta verificación rápida garantiza que puedas empezar a usar tu tarjeta casi de inmediato, manteniendo los estándares de cumplimiento necesarios.

index_page_content: Apple Pay, Google Pay and PayPal Support

You can use your Bitsika Virtual Card on digital wallets like Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal for seamless online transactions. Here's how to set it up:  

1. Generate your virtual card on the Bitsika platform.  

2. Add the card to your preferred wallet on Apple Pay, Google Pay, or PayPal.  

3. Once approved, your card will be ready for secure payments through the wallet.  

Now you can enjoy hassle-free spending wherever these wallets are accepted.
content: Tu Tarjeta Virtual Bitsika funciona en más de 200 países en todo el mundo. Ya sea para compras en línea, suscripciones a servicios o pagos internacionales, tu tarjeta es aceptada donde quiera que Visa lo sea. Para usuarios en Venezuela, esto significa acceso conveniente a plataformas internacionales que pueden tener limitaciones con tarjetas bancarias locales.

index_page_content: Bitsika Virtual Cards are prepaid, meaning you load a custom amount before using them. This gives you the flexibility to create cards with the exact funds needed by you. We offer two types:  Standard Prepaid Cards: Ideal for one-time online payments. Generated instantly, they can only be topped up once after creation.  Premium Prepaid Cards: Perfect for recurring transactions and long-term use. These can be reloaded indefinitely, offering a convenient and reliable payment option. Loved by our users, 70% choose Premium Cards for their flexibility.
content: Las Tarjetas Virtuales Bitsika son prepagas, lo que significa que controlas exactamente cuánto gastar. Para usuarios en Venezuela, esto ofrece una forma conveniente y controlada de gestionar gastos internacionales.

index_page_content: Bitsika Visa Debit Cards are Virtual

The Bitsika Virtual Card is a digital Visa debit card with a card number, expiry date, and CVV like a regular card, but no physical form. As a debit card, every payment comes directly from your loaded balance, so you can only spend what you fund. The cards are issued by Visa, making them globally accepted for online payments and mobile wallets like Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal. You can top up instantly with Bitcoin or USDT and manage everything inside the Bitsika app.
content: Con Bitsika puedes crear tarjetas virtuales ilimitadas. ¿Necesitas una para suscripciones, otra para compras y otra para pruebas? Sin problema. Cada tarjeta puede gestionarse por separado, ofreciendo a usuarios en Venezuela máxima flexibilidad y organización para diferentes necesidades de pago.

index_page_content: Cards are Instant (Takes 5 Minutes to Create)

Bitsika Virtual Cards can be used immediately after creation. No KYC is required, so you can go from sign-up to using your card within 5 minutes of downloading the app. In fact, 60% of users create their card within that time. After creation, you receive your card number, CVV, billing address, and expiry date, so you can start paying online right away.
content: Las Tarjetas Premium Bitsika son recargables, permitiéndote añadir fondos cuando lo necesites. A diferencia de las tarjetas de un solo uso, las Premium pueden usarse repetidamente, ideales para suscripciones recurrentes y uso regular. Para usuarios en Venezuela que realizan pagos internacionales frecuentes, esto ofrece conveniencia y ahorro de tiempo.

index_page_content: Bitsika offers both Visa Gift Cards and Virtual Visa Debit Cards. A Visa Gift Card comes with a fixed balance for one time or limited use and cannot be reloaded once spent, but you can fund it with Bitcoin, USDT or other crypto.  A Virtual Visa Debit Card is reloadable and flexible, letting you top up with crypto anytime for subscriptions, online shopping and daily payments. With features like balance management, freeze and unfreeze and instant reloads, the Virtual Visa Debit Card gives you more control, while the Gift Card is best for simple one off payments or gifting.
content: Cada Tarjeta Virtual Bitsika Premium puede recargarse con hasta $500.000 al mes. Este límite alto acomoda tanto a usuarios individuales como a pequeñas empresas en Venezuela que necesitan procesar volúmenes significativos de transacciones internacionales. Sea para compras personales o gastos empresariales, Bitsika ofrece capacidad suficiente.

index_page_content: Each Bitsika Virtual Visa card can be topped up with as much as $500,000 per month, giving you the freedom to handle high-value transactions with ease. There's no cap on how many individual cards you can create, so you can separate spending across different cards for shopping, subscriptions, business expenses, or personal use. This combination of high limits and unlimited card creation gives you flexibility that most other virtual card providers simply do not offer.

index_page_content: Who is the Bitsika Virtual Card for?

index_page_content: The Bitsika Virtual Visa Card is designed for a wide variety of users who need fast, flexible, and secure payments. Gamers benefit from instant access to credits, top-ups, and in-game items on global platforms, and online shoppers can purchase from international e-commerce sites that might not accept local payment methods. Content subscribers on platforms like OnlyFans, as well as streaming or SaaS services, enjoy the privacy and discretion of paying with an alias. Remote workers and digital nomads use Bitsika across more than 200 countries, while entrepreneurs and small businesses can create multiple cards to manage staff or project expenses. Privacy-conscious users also prefer Bitsika since transactions remain separate from their personal bank records. With instant creation, Bitcoin and USDT funding, and no KYC required, Bitsika is a modern solution that serves anyone who wants a powerful alternative to traditional bank cards.
